properties.site_search_aliases: Huntingburg; Dubois County; Huntingburg Airport; David Ring wheat field
properties.site_imagery_provider: Earthfiles aerial; Indiana Geographic Information Office 2005 Orthophotography
properties.site_rights_status: remote_source_pixels_not_cleared_for_embedding
